summary: Frontend testing completed with authentication system verification. Login functionality works correctly but admin routes are protected and inaccessible with provided user credentials. Tour management pages (/tour-list, /tour-request) and hotel edit functionality require admin permissions.

authentication_issues.issue: Admin routes (/tour-list, /tour-request, /your-hotels/:id/edit) are protected and redirect to homepage for non-admin users
authentication_issues.note: This is expected behavior - routes are properly protected

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test tour list, tour request, and hotel edit functionality due to insufficient user permissions
integration_issues.note: User Av95766@gmail.com appears to be a regular user, not admin

passed_tests: Login form loads correctly on /login route
Email input field accepts and validates email format
Password input field accepts password input
Sign In button is clickable and functional
User session is established after successful login
Profile dropdown menu appears after login
Admin routes properly redirect unauthorized users
React SPA routing functions as expected

success_percentage.backend: 50% - Authentication API working, admin routes protected
success_percentage.frontend: 60% - Login flow complete, route protection working, admin features untestable

action_item_for_main_agent: Provide admin user credentials to enable testing of tour-list, tour-request, and hotel edit pages. Current user (Av95766@gmail.com) has regular user permissions only. Alternatively, create a test admin user or modify existing user permissions for testing purposes.
